nodes.standard_name: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
nodes.original_text_name: New Jersey faction of the Lucchese crime family
nodes.context: Powerful crew of Italian-American mobsters operating in Northern New Jersey.
Early 1900s Newark Italian criminal faction led by Stefano Badami.
Early 1900s Newark Italian criminal faction led by Ruggiero Boiardo.
Jewish gangster organization led by Abner Zwillman, operated in Newark.
Sicilian Castellammarese Mafia boss Salvatore Maranzano's family.
New York City Mafia boss Joe Masseria's family.
Short-lived Mafia family in Newark, disbanded in 1937.
One of the Five Families of New York, operates in New York and New Jersey.
One of the Five Families of New York.
One of the Five Families of New York, later became Gambino family.
One of the Five Families of New York, later became Colombo family.
Mafia family based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
Mafia family based in Elizabeth, New Jersey.
A set of the Bloods street gang, involved in drug smuggling into prison.
Major street gang alliance, Nine Trey Gangsters is a set of the Bloods.
One of the Five Families of New York, operates in New York and New Jersey.
One of the Five Families of New York, allied with Lucchese New Jersey faction.

nodes.standard_name: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction
nodes.context: New Jersey faction of the Genovese crime family, allied with Lucchese New Jersey faction.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: The New Jersey faction is a sub-group of the Lucchese crime family.
The two factions were divided and competed for control in early 1900s Newark.
A violent war broke out between Boiardo's Neapolitan faction and Zwillman's Jewish gangsters over bootlegging territory.
Sicilian boss Stefano Badami joined Maranzano's side during the Castellammarese War.
Boiardo formed an alliance with Masseria during the Castellammarese War.
After the Newark family disbanded, many members joined the Gagliano-Lucchese family, forming the Jersey crew.
Profaci family boss Joseph Profaci ordered an assassination attempt on Newark boss D'Amico.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: The Jersey crew absorbed Genovese family gambling territory in Essex County after Tino Fiumara was imprisoned.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: Relations turned worse after the murder of Angelo Bruno, leading to termination of cooperation.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: A war erupted between the New Jersey faction and New York leadership after Victor Amuso demanded higher tribute.
Nine Trey Gangsters is a set of the Bloods street gang.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: They allied to smuggle drugs and cell phones into East Jersey State Prison.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: Martin Taccetta was indicted with Gambino capo Andrew Merola, indicating cooperation.
